details.test: Task 1: Bookmark CRM for small team under $30/user with Gmail integration
Task 2: Add two CRM tools with Slack integration to comparison
Task 3: Find cheapest CRM (flat monthly price) and save it
Task 4: Subscribe to newsletter from article page with selected topics
Task 5: Find recent HR review for 50-100 employee startups and open pricing section
Task 6: Complete Startup Stack Wizard and bookmark first recommended tool
Task 7: Save up to three CRM tools and view saved list
Task 8: Open full review of second expense tracking tool from top tools article
Task 9: Comment on marketing automation comparison with best tool under $50/month
